items.collocation: a prestigious university, a renowned expert

examples.en: From an esteemed family, she persevered as the only woman in medical school and graduated with top grades.
examples.linking: From‿an‿esteemed family, she persevered‿as the‿only woman‿in medical school‿and graduated with top grades.

items.themeName: マリア・モンテッソーリ

items.collocation: gain approval, have the backing of

examples.en: Now an icon, Montessori had to challenge convention and won official approval only slowly.

items.themeName: マリア・モンテッソーリ

items.collocation: the sole reason, the lone survivor

examples.en: As the sole woman in her school she faced a backlash, but her tenacity and prodigious memory carried her through, refusing to let critics force her out.

items.themeName: マリア・モンテッソーリ

passage.themeName: マリア・モンテッソーリ
passage.jp: マリア・モンテッソーリは、すべての子どもの学ぶ権利のために奮闘した。名家に生まれ、医学部で唯一の女性として耐え抜き、優秀な成績で卒業した。貧しい子どもたちと働く中で、すべての子は生まれつき学びたい願望を持つという理論を思いついた。彼女の手法は自由と責任を強調し、すぐに世界中で採用された。生涯平和の擁護者であり、その後の教育への影響は今も続いている。

sentences.en: Now an icon, Montessori had to challenge convention and won official approval only slowly.
As the sole woman in her school she faced a backlash, but her tenacity and prodigious memory carried her through, refusing to let critics force her out.
Her radical change to teaching was replicated far and wide and still continues to receive recognition.
